feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error when importing spreadsheet in configuration activity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

While trying to import a configuration spreadsheet in any configuration activity i get the following error:

Sorry, the app couldn't be opened.

The navigation target "#BusinessConfiguration-upload?IMGActivity=CFORFBTHKON&ObjectName=V_THKON&ObjectType=V&SubObjectName=&sap-app-origin-hint=&sap-language=E&sap-ushell-navmode=explace" of the app could not be resolved. This can be caused, for example, by an incorrect content configuration, an incorrect or missing role assignment, or because your current device is not supported.

I'm using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and accessing it through the "implementation activities" app.
I have the BR_BPC_Expert Role with no restrictions and can access all configuration activities. With that in mind I can't import the spreadsheets but can export them in all allowed configuration activities.

Can anyone help me with this problem?

Thank you,
Diogo Boneco

entry.title: Lease out contracts cannot be attached to usable object
entry.content: I tried creating a lease out contract from a usable object I created. But I get an error saying the usable object cannot be assigned lease out contracts. I then created a rentable object and assigned a usable object to it, but there is no section to create a contract from the rentable object. So I went to create a standalone contract , but still cannot assign the usable object to the contract

entry.title: I have a question about accounting entries for credit risk-based impairment provisioning.
entry.content: 我需要知道是否可以将基于信用风险的减值会计分录记为借方“信用减值损失”，贷记为“坏账准备”，不想直接记账到对账科目

entry.title: Requirement to Carry Forward G/L Balances During Vendor Upload
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have received a business requirement from the client.

The client would like to know whether there is any standard functionality or upload option available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to carry forward the existing G/L balances to the respective vendor accounts during the vendor upload process.

Could you please confirm:

  • Whether this functionality is supported in the standard system.
  • If supported, please provide the recommended process, app, or migration object to achieve this requirement.
  • If not supported, please advise the recommended approach for carrying forward G/L balances during vendor 

Your guidance on this requirement would be appreciated.


Thanks & Regards 
Alam Imran

entry.title: PR Document type deactivation
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The standard document option "NB" has been created with the new document types ZCPR and ZDPR. However, these document types are not required. How do I proceed with deactivating these document types?

entry.title: Manage Fixed Assets – Main Number of Original Asset - Subnumber Field
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

Hello, I'm Nozomu Kihara.

Our customer would like to maintain the fixed asset numbers managed in another system within the fixed asset master records in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Specifically, they would like to store the fixed asset management number from the other system in the Legacy Main Number - Subnumber field.

When creating a fixed asset master record using the Manage Fixed Assets app, we would like to enter a value in the Legacy Main Number - Subnumber  field.

We are able to populate this field when migrating fixed asset master data, but it does not appear to be editable on the Manage Fixed Assets app screen.

Is it possible to enter or maintain this field directly in the app? If so, could you please let us know how?

If it is not possible to maintain the Legacy Main Number - Subnumber field, could you please recommend an alternative standard field that can be used for this purpose?

Please note that the Additional Description field cannot be used because it is already reserved for another business purpose.

entry.title: Advanced intercompany STO - Sales Area Mismatch in Error Message
entry.content:
Hello experts,

During our testing of the advanced in process(5HP) in SAP Cloud Public Edition, Starter system, we encountered a discrepancy between the configuration and the error message. The STO was set up with sales area 32CN / C1 / D0, and the shipping data was consistently maintained with this combination. The STO document also correctly reflects the same shipping data.

However, the error message states that the receiving ship‑to party master does not have sales data maintained for 32CN / C1 / 00, which is odd because it should be checking 32CN / C1 / D0 instead.

Sales area 32CN / C1 / 00 does not exist in our system... we are unsure where the system is deriving the 32CN / C1 / 00 combination used in the error message.

Shipping data of supplying plant:

IC PO:

Error message:

 

Has anyone experienced a similar issue, and how did you resolve it?

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

Jennifer

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Advanced intercompany STO Sales Area Mismatch in Error Message
entry.content:
Hello experts,

During our testing of the advanced in process(5HP) in SAP Cloud Public Edition, Starter system, we encountered a discrepancy between the configuration and the error message. The STO was set up with sales area 32CN / C1 / D0, and the shipping data was consistently maintained with this combination. The STO document also correctly reflects the same shipping data.

However, the error message states that the receiving ship‑to party master does not have sales area data maintained for 32CN / C1 / 00, which is odd because it there is no sales area 32CN / C1 / 00 in our system... we are unsure where the system is deriving the sales area used in the error message.

 

Shipping data of supplying plant:

IC PO:

Error message:

Has anyone experienced a similar issue, and how did you resolve it?

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

Jennifer

entry.title: Service PO Item text not come in po print in public cloud
entry.content: HOW TO FLOW PO ITEM TEXT IN THE STANDARD FIELD IN PO PRINT , WHEN PO CREATION ITEM TEXT IS MAINTAIN BUT THE VALUE DOES NOT FLOW IN ITEM LEVEL IN THE STANDARD FIELD IN PO PRINT , I HAVE BIND THE STANDARD FIELD in po print AND CONFIG LEVEL THE ITEM TEXT IS ENABLED , ONLY SERVICE PO CASE IN PUBLIC CLOUD GROW THIS PROBLEM HAPPEN

entry.title: Need to fetch value for custom field in Manage Customer Line Item
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Good Wishes!!

As standard Profit Center value is not getting populated manage customer line item. SO, we have created custom field for copy that through cds view and get the value but values are not coming.
For custom field the business context is this Accounting: Journal Entry Item and custom logic is this FIN_ACDOC_SUBSTITUTION .

So, please tell whether it is possible to get value for profit center or not. Or any other way is there to get.

Thanks & Regards,

Vidya

entry.title: WBS Sales Contract Position - WBS Element
entry.content:
Im Migrationstemplate für Verkaufskontrakt gibt es sowohl am Kopfbeleg als auch an der Position das Feld PSP Element für die Kontierung.

Im Dialog kann dies jedoch nicht eingeblendet werden (UI Design).

Wird die Kontierung von PSP Elementen im Verkaufskontrakt (Kopf und Beleg) unterstützt? Laut Hilfe Verkaufskontraktposition | SAP Help Portal  kann das Feld genutzt werden. 

Ein extra kundeneigenes Feld ist nicht die Lösung, wir möchten gerne die Integration in das CO analog wie bei Service Contracts, wo das PSP Element mitgegeben werden kann

entry.title: End-to-End Setup of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations – Landscape & Monitoring
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to setup SAP Cloud ALM for Operations for S/4HANA systems (DEV, QAS, PROD) and needed step by step guidance on:

Scope:

  1. IAS user onboarding
  2. Landscape management integration
  3. Monitoring configuration:
    • Health Monitoring
    • Integration & Exception Monitoring
    • Job Monitoring
    • Business Process Monitoring
    • Real User Monitoring

Implementation: Transport Management:

1.Create Project, System Groups, Deployment Plan, Tags, Workstreams, Roles, Teams

2.Assigning the Roles & Authorizations to Users

entry.title: Display Line Items in General Ledger App
entry.content:
Please find the best practice alternatives below: 

  • Display Line Items in General Ledger App: Add the “Document Currency” and “Amount in Document Currency” columns and filter/group as needed.
  • Display Journal Entries App: Search by G/L account, company code, period, etc., then show “Document Currency” and “Amount in DC.”
  • Manage Journal Entries App: Provides flexible filters and columns, including document currency on line items.

-> The balance app is designed for period totals by defined currency types (e.g., company code currency and parallel currencies). Document/transaction currency is inherently a line-item attribute and varies across postings for the same G/L account/period, which is why SAP surfaces it in line-item and journal-entry apps rather than the balance overview.

entry.title: Existe forma de registrar no DRC(Public) notas históricas já autorizados em outro sistema?
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal!

Estou passando por uma situação no SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (release 2602) no Brasil, e chegamos em um cenário que não encontramos documentado em nenhum lugar. Se alguém do time de DRC puder ajudar, agradeço muito.

**Cenário**
O cliente operava em um sistema legado (não-SAP) antes desta implantação. Esse sistema legado emitiu e transmitiu notas fiscais de saída (NF-e modelo 55) que já foram autorizadas pela SEFAZ em períodos fiscais anteriores (ou seja, já possuem chave de acesso, protocolo de autorização e XML autorizado pela SEFAZ).

O cliente agora precisa que esses documentos históricos apareçam no monitor fiscal do novo sistema S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (app Administrar Documentos Eletrônicos / SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de faturamento de saída para o Brasil) — unicamente para fins de registro interno e continuidade de auditoria. Não queremos retransmitir esses documentos à SEFAZ, já que eles foram autorizados sob uma numeração/série diferente, gerada pelo sistema legado.

**Perguntas**
1. Existe algum relatório, app ou objeto de migração padrão para registrar documentos de saída (NF-e e possivelmente CT-e/NFS-e) já autorizados, no monitor DRC do Brasil, sem disparar transmissão à SEFAZ?
2. A funcionalidade "Upload Electronic Documents to eDocument Cockpit" (documentação DC_NFe) se aplica a esse cenário, ou tem outra finalidade?

Qualquer indicação — documentação oficial, SAP Notes ou experiência real de projeto — ajudaria muito. Desde já, agradeço!

entry.title: Best Practice to Activate Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad for German and Austria and Italy
entry.content:
中国客户的出海项目，需要激活德国、奥地利、意大利工厂的  Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad (RITA) 国外间接征税登记 (RITA) ，希望了解如何不影响 DRC Cloud Edition的正常使用，避免影响到DRC Cloud Edition报表的准确性。

RITA 激活时：
1. European Community（欧洲共同体）销售清单中报告货币金额可能不正确，和客户使用场景产生冲突，金额不正确会产生很大的风险
2. 若 EC 销售清单设置了"税行项目基准金额"参数，则当三角交易标识或增值税号不唯一时，货币折算不生效

三角交易处理方式流程如下：
4  Triangular Transaction (Dreiecksgeschaeft) / 三角交易处理
U3(Germany) -> U2(Austria) -> U1(Italy) direct ship. U2 invoices U3.
Tax Treatment: U1 invoices U2 w/ VAT; U2 invoices U3 (Reverse Charge); U3 receives RC invoice

报税处理流程如下：
5  Tax Declaration (March / Juni / September) / 税务申报
SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2602 supports tax declaration via DRC module (FSD_01 3.9.3.4).
VAT filing frequency: Monthly (VAT > 7,500) deadline 10th next month; Quarterly (VAT <= 7,500); Annual (VAT <= 1,000)
Supported: UStVA, Elster, Intrastat, Reverse Charge, Annual VAT

了解到如下的已知限制，希望和SAP专家讨论有何变通办法解决：

现金折扣（Cash Discount）激活时：

  • 凭证货币与公司代码货币不同，且含不同税码时，不得修改本币金额
  • 含现金折扣或税务相关付款差异的支付/清账，付款中报告货币税额与发票不能同汇率折算
  • 同一凭证中部分行项目涉及现金折扣、部分不涉及时，税额折算汇率不一致
  • 按服务日期折算（Service-Rendered Date）激活时：
  • 支付中报告货币税额与发票折算汇率不一致

RITA 激活时：

  • EC 销售清单中报告货币金额可能不正确
  • 若 EC 销售清单设置了"税行项目基准金额"参数，则当三角交易标识或增值税号不唯一时，货币折算不生效
  • 预付款（Down Payment）： 预付款与发票必须使用相同凭证/交易货币

高级公司间流程（Advanced Intercompany）：

  • 客户发票中多税条件、含现金折扣的税基等情况暂不支持
  • 通过 IDoc 过账供应商会计凭证不支持
  • 发票校验中使用加权平均汇率可能导致税额与税基不匹配
  • Central Finance： 源系统为云系统时，不得激活历史汇率功能
  • 西班牙： 高级 ICO 流程及多税码暂不支持

如有建议，盼联络  jing.zhang@boscloud.cn 和 julia.lu@sap.com，感谢帮助。

entry.title: We need your guidance regarding Cost Center Budgeting
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We upload the budget using a combination of Cost Center and G/L Account. However, we have observed that when posting transactions, the system validates the budget only at the Cost Center level and not at the G/L Account + Cost Center combination level.For example, if we upload separate budgets for different G/L accounts under the same Cost Center, the system still allows postings that exceed the budget of a particular G/L account, as long as the total Cost Center budget has not been exceeded. No error message is triggered for the individual G/L Account budget.Our client requires budget control at the G/L Account + Cost Center combination level, so that the system issues an error whenever the budget for a specific G/L Account within a Cost Center is exceeded.Could you please confirm whether this functionality is supported in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud? If so, could you advise on the required configuration or the recommended approach to achieve this requirement?Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

Krishnpal Singh

entry.title: Mass Upload option for the Physical Inventory Count
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Customer requirement is to upload mass physical inventory count.

Is there any Bapi is available to check on this.

Regards,

entry.title: PO number should be available in the payment proposal at header level.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Our client wants the option PO number in the header level during creation of payment proposal. In the interface this field is not available even in the settings option. Please provide a solution for this.

Regards,

Shatabdi

entry.title: Calculate Tax on gross amount
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Business has a requirement to calculate tax based on the Gross amount instead. They receive invoice from vendor which inclusive of VAT amount. I tried the accounting editing option as per below community blog , but it is not working. We are using latest SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Edition

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-members/tax-calculation-on-net-or-gross-invoice-amount/ba-p/13573651

Best Regards,

Samad Farooq Dandiya

entry.title: Default Counted Date Based on Physical Inventory Count Entry Date
entry.content:
We are using the Physical Inventory process with Book Inventory Freeze enabled.

Current process:

  • Physical Inventory Document is created and book inventory is frozen on 27.06.2026.
  • Users may complete the physical count several days later, for example on 30.06.2026.
  • During count entry, users need to manually change the Counted Date / Count Date of Uncounted Items from current date (30.06.2026) to planned count date (27.06.2026)
Does any standard configuration or custom extensibility option to default the Counted Date automatically instead of requiring users to update it manually?
